description: Align 8 cytochrome c protein sequences from `~/UGENE_Data/cytochrome_c_multispecies.fasta` using MUSCLE. Export the initial alignment in ClustalW format to `~/UGENE_Data/curated_alignment/initial_cytochrome.aln`. Curate the alignment by removing the outgroup sequence (identifier `P00053`) and deleting the first 15 and last 15 columns. Export the resulting alignment in ClustalW format to `~/UGENE_Data/curated_alignment/curated_cytochrome.aln`. Create a report at `~/UGENE_Data/curated_alignment/curation_report.txt` containing the initial and final alignment lengths (in columns) and a note regarding the removal of P00053.
